overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character in a white lab coat exploring a high-tech control room or laboratory interior. The character walks past monitoring stations and desks while approaching an NPC standing near an exit door.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-tech control room with monitoring stations

agents.ego_description: walking toward the wall of monitors and control panels on the left side of the room

entered.detail: bank of six digital screens displaying schematics and data readouts mounted on the wall
curved seating with yellow cushions against the back wall
white workstations with equipment and papers on the left side
large oval window or screen showing green-tinted display on the back wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dimly lit, futuristic control room with cool grey tones. Multiple monitor screens glow with data on the left wall while a curved yellow couch sits against the back wall. The room features industrial metal flooring and ceiling panels with embedded lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: control room exit area with guard station

events.description: character turns and walks toward the exit door, revealing an NPC guard standing nearby

agents.ego_description: walking across the room toward the exit door where a guard is standing

notable_agents.action: standing guard near the exit door wearing tactical gear with arms crossed

entered.detail: metal sliding door with illuminated panel above showing 'EXIT' signage
stacked metal storage containers and cabinets on the right side
cluttered table with various items and equipment on the right

segments.scene_description: The character moves toward the exit area of the control room where an NPC guard stands near a sliding metal door. The monitor array and seating area fall behind as the character approaches the door, passing equipment lockers and a workbench. The guard remains stationary, observing the character's approach.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit, futuristic control room that transitions from a data-filled workspace toward a guarded exit. It begins by tracking the character past glowing monitor screens and a curved yellow couch set against cool grey walls and industrial metal flooring. As the character advances, the monitor array and seating area recede into the background, giving way to a corridor of equipment lockers and a workbench. The scene then shifts focus toward the far end of the room, where the camera closes in on a stationary NPC guard standing watch by a sliding metal door.
